summary: Smoke | Verify Welcome Center Page Load (Home Page)
gherkin:
Given a user is logged into mlb.com/tv (any user)
And the user is not on the Welcome Center (Home page)
When the user selects "MLB.TV" in the navigation header
Then the "MLB.TV" page loads without issues
And the Hero section should display relevant content
And available carousels should be visible on the Home page
